zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：震荡偏强整理
zh.content:
当前ETH/美元维持高位窄幅震荡，价格运行于1780上方，接近1790压力区，短线多空拉锯明显，整体仍偏震荡上行结构。延续中运行中

MACD柱值5.68维持正区，动能略有走强迹象，但缺乏信号线参考；价格站稳SMA20（1775）上方，趋势支撑仍有效延续偏强运行

上方阻力关注1790及1800整数关口，下方支撑位1775与1780区间，若跌破则可能回踩1750区域，结构转弱。关注量能变化

短线策略建议观望偏多思路，未有效跌破1775前可考虑回调低吸，突破1790并站稳后可顺势追多，注意控制波动风险。谨慎交易为主管理

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
ETH/USD is currently trading in a tight consolidation phase around 1782.8, following a marginal 24-hour decline of 0.20%. Price action has remained compressed between 1780.56 and 1790.58, highlighting a lack of strong directional conviction. Despite the slight intraday bearish bias, the broader structure remains neutral as Ethereum continues to hold above its short-term moving average. This type of volatility contraction often precedes a sharper breakout in either direction.

The MACD reading at 5.67589 suggests underlying momentum is still mildly positive, though weakening compared to prior expansion phases. Without a confirmed signal line, trend confirmation remains limited, reducing confidence in directional strength. Price positioning above the 20-period SMA at 1775.01 indicates that buyers are still defending short-term trend support. However, the absence of RSI data makes momentum gauging less precise, reinforcing a cautious interpretation of current market conditions.

From a structural perspective, immediate support is established at the SMA20 around 1775, with a secondary support zone near 1760 where previous consolidation activity likely absorbed selling pressure. On the upside, resistance is firmly defined at 1790.58, marking the recent range high. A sustained breakout above this level could open a path toward 1815, where prior supply pressure may re-emerge and slow upward continuation.

In terms of strategy, traders may favor range-bound approaches while ETH remains trapped between 1775 and 1790, targeting reversals near extremes with tight risk controls. A confirmed breakout above resistance could justify momentum-based long entries, while a breakdown below support would shift bias toward short positions targeting 1760. Given compressed volatility, false breakouts remain a key risk, making disciplined position sizing essential.
